days.title: Arrival & Sentosa Introduction
days.weather: Partly cloudy, 27°C. Seasonal estimate for June.
activities: Arrive at Changi Airport, check into hotel near Marina Bay or Sentosa.
Take the Sentosa Express monorail to Sentosa Island.
Explore the beachfront area and enjoy a sunset dinner.
days.budgetNote: Accommodation and transport costs accounted for. Dinner budget approx SGD 50.

days.title: Sentosa Adventure Day
days.weather: Scattered thunderstorms, 30°C. Seasonal estimate for June.
activities: Visit Universal Studios Singapore for half-day fun.
Relax at Siloso Beach in the afternoon.
Watch the Wings of Time night show.
days.budgetNote: USS tickets approx SGD 75. Show tickets approx SGD 40. Total daily spend approx SGD 120.

days.title: Marina Bay & VivoCity Exploration
days.weather: Hot and humid, 32°C. Seasonal estimate for June.
activities: Start at VivoCity mall for shopping and dining.
Take the cable car from VivoCity to Sentosa for views (optional) or walk to Marina Bay via Promenade.
Visit Gardens by the Bay (Cloud Forest & Flower Dome).
Walk along Marina Bay Sands promenade.
days.budgetNote: Gardens by the Bay entry approx SGD 35. Shopping budget flexible. Total daily spend approx SGD 80.

days.title: Sentosa Luxury & Nature
days.weather: Partly cloudy, 29°C. Seasonal estimate for June.
activities: Lunch at a hawker center nearby for authentic local food.
Explore Adventure Cove Waterpark or relax at Palawan Beach.
days.budgetNote: Aquarium entry approx SGD 40. Local lunch approx SGD 10. Total daily spend approx SGD 60.

days.title: Cultural Heritage & Departure
activities: Visit Chinatown and Little India for cultural immersion.
Shop for souvenirs at Mustafa Centre or Orchard Road.
days.budgetNote: Low cost activities. Souvenir budget approx SGD 50. Total daily spend approx SGD 60.

categories.name: Clothing
items: Water-resistant sneakers for thunderstorms and walking
Hat or cap for sun protection

categories.name: Electronics
items: Universal power adapter (Singapore uses Type G plugs)

categories.name: Documents & Money
items: Hotel and flight confirmations (digital or printed)
Small amount of local currency (SGD) for tips and hawker centers

categories.name: Accessories & Misc
items: Small daypack or backpack for daily excursions
